items.title: The Bucks SL team is getting absolutely trucked by Miami rn, but Brayden Burries has looked tremendous. Using Bogoljub Markovic at center has been ... less tremendous.
items.author: John Hollinger
items.body_excerpt: The Bucks SL team is getting absolutely trucked by Miami rn, but Brayden Burries has looked tremendous. Using Bogoljub Markovic at center has been ... less tremendous.

items.title: The Milwaukee Bucks have signed 2025 second-round pick Bogoljub Markovic, a league source told @spotrac.com.
items.author: KeithSmithNBA
